texto: After years studying informality in Nigeria, Dutch architect and planner Rem Koolhaas reach the same conclusion. In the West, he writes, “there’s a sense of infinite choice, but a very conventional set of options from which to choose.” By contrast, “in Lagos, there is no choice, but there are countless ways to articulate the condition of no choice.
explicacao: Citação de Dayo Olopade sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “After years studying informality in Nigeria, Dutch architect and planner Rem Koolhaas reach the s…” articula reflexao, choice, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como estudos e reflexao.
